cards.title: Hydrotherapy Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Full immersion bath: Temperature ranges (cold 15–20°C, neutral 33–36°C, hot 38–40°C)
  • Cold mitten friction bath: Technique & tonic effect
  • Contrast bath: 3:1 ratio (hot:cold), 3 cycles for limbs
  • Wet sheet pack: Fever management protocol
  • Sitz bath (hip bath): Constipation, haemorrhoids, gynaecological

cards.title: Mud Therapy
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Mud pack for eyes: 20 min, relieves eyestrain, inflammation
  • Full mud bath: 20–30 min, mineral absorption
  • Abdominal mud pack: Digestive conditions, 30 min
  • Temperature & consistency guidelines
  • Local mud application: Headache, fever, arthritis

cards.title: Massage Therapy
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Effleurage: Slow, rhythmic, towards heart
  • Petrissage: Kneading, lifting, rolling — muscle groups
  • Tapotement: Hacking, cupping, beating — stimulating
  • Swedish full body: 60-min standard sequence
  • Abhyanga (Ayurvedic): Sesame oil, specific strokes

cards.title: Fasting & Diet Therapy
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Water fast (24h): Supervision, indications, contraindications
  • Juice fast (3–7 days): Vegetable + fruit combinations
  • Mono fruit fast: Single fruit, 1–3 days
  • Breaking the fast: Raw fruit → cooked → normal diet
  • Refeeding syndrome: Prevention in prolonged fasting

cards.title: Other Naturopathic Modalities
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Chromotherapy: Colour application, solarised water preparation
  • Magneto therapy: North/South pole application protocols
  • Acupressure: Zone therapy, hand & foot maps
  • Hypnotherapy: Applications in habit change, pain, IBS
  • Sand bath: Mineral absorption, arthritis management

cards.title: Ayurveda Treatments
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Shirodhara: Warm sesame oil on forehead, 30–45 min
  • Kati Basti: Lumbar pain, warm oil pool retention
  • Netra Tarpana: Eye rejuvenation with ghee
  • Udvartana: Herbal powder massage, obesity, kapha conditions
  • Pizhichil: King of treatments — oil bath
